sourcesContent:
import * as React from "react"
import * as SelectPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-select"
import { ChevronDown } from "lucide-react"

export const Select = SelectPrimitive.Root
export const SelectTrigger = React.forwardRef(({ children, ...props }, ref) => (
  <SelectPrimitive.Trigger
    ref={ref}
    className="flex h-10 w-[180px] items-center justify-between rounded-md border px-3 text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
    {...props}
  >
    {children}
    <ChevronDown className="ml-2 h-4 w-4 opacity-50" />
  </SelectPrimitive.Trigger>
))
SelectTrigger.displayName = SelectPrimitive.Trigger.displayName

export const SelectValue = SelectPrimitive.Value
export const SelectContent = SelectPrimitive.Content
export const SelectItem = SelectPrimitive.Item
